name: baml
description: Teaches Claude Code to write idiomatic BAML. Ships five skills: `core` (install, syntax, stdlib, agent loop, JSON + match + errors — always load first), `llm-functions` (clients, prompts, structured output, `client:` colon syntax), `pipelines` (composing typed LLM stages, match routing, error propagation), `testing` (testset blocks, cached JSON fixtures via `baml.json.from_string`), `bridges` (the `baml_sdk` Python client, `generator` blocks, shell bridges). All content aligned to the canonical BAML agent guide.
